name: Radiation Sickness
idea: The deck exploits two interlocking counter systems.

briefKills.line: Mindcrank + Bloodchief Ascension (3 quest counters live) → infinite mill → drain loop
Simic Ascendancy reaches 20 growth counters → win at your upkeep

openings: Weakest axis — Durability (4/5): the judges' soft spot.
Combo is a side line; fast clock = counter-board (was FINDING, -9pp front7).
Tables (all three) never-close 1% of the time.

clock.src: lab rs_clock_lab @8k · Mothman summoning-sickness fix 2026-06-29 · Mindcrank-amp gated on Bloodchief 2026-07-02 (table -2pp; med T7/T10 holds)
clock.caption: Decap (one opponent) lands around T7; the full table around T10.

gamePlan: The deck exploits two interlocking counter systems. Mothman distributes rad counters to all players on ETB and attack. Those rad counters force opponents to mill and lose life each turn. Proliferate amplifies both the rad counters on opponents (increasing future mill depth and life drain) and the +1/+1 counters on your creatures (growing your board). Every mill event feeds Mothman's second ability, distributing more +1/+1 counters, which proliferate then doubles again.

finishers.name: Counter Overload
finishers.note: Grow creatures through proliferate + Mothman distribution + counter doublers until they're lethal.

finishers.name: Simic Ascendancy
finishers.note: Enchantment: whenever counters are placed on a creature you control, put that many growth counters on Simic Ascendancy.

finishers.name: Mindcrank + Bloodchief Ascension
finishers.note: Once Bloodchief Ascension has 3 quest counters (proliferate accelerates this — 1-2 turns instead of 3), any life loss triggers Mindcrank → mill → triggers Ascension → more life loss → infinite.

finishers.name: Walking Ballista
finishers.note: Enters with X +1/+1 counters, removes them to deal 1 damage.

finishers.name: Herd Baloth + Counter Engine
finishers.note: Herd Baloth creates a 4/4 Beast token whenever a +1/+1 counter is placed on it.

finishers.name: Iridescent Hornbeetle
finishers.note: Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are placed on a creature you control, create that many 1/1 Insect tokens.

finishers.name: Triumph of the Hordes
finishers.note: 4-mana sorcery: until end of turn, your creatures get +1/+1, trample, and **infect**.

rulings.name: Rad counters decay ONLY when nonland cards are milled
rulings.note: milling a land removes no rad counter, so it persists into the next turn. Fighting that decay with proliferate is the whole engine.

rulings.name: Rad counters hit EVERYONE, including you
rulings.note: you self-mill and lose life. Morgul-Knife (Shadowspear) lifelink is the built-in offset.

rulings.name: Proliferate adds rad counters to opponents AND +1/+1 counters to your creatures simultaneously
The multipliers stack multiplicatively
rulings.note: Tekuthal doubles all proliferate; Vorinclex MR doubles every counter you place on opponents (Mothman ETB → 2 rad each) and your own placements; Doubling Season doubles counters on your permanents — including Bloodchief's quest counters, so the combo arms in 2 life-loss triggers, not 3.

rulings.name: Mothman's +1/+1 distribution triggers once per mill event
rulings.note: , regardless of how many players milled at once.

rulings.name: Mindcrank + Bloodchief is not online the turn Bloodchief lands
rulings.note: it needs 3 quest counters first (proliferate accelerates this).

SIDEBOARD:
1 Psychic Corrosion
1 Swiftfoot Boots

1 The Wise Mothman

keep.mixed: combo is a side line; fast clock = counter-board (was FINDING, -9pp front7)

mull.strategy: Looking for: lands + ramp + Mothman or a proliferate engine. A Mindcrank/Bloodchief piece in the opener is upside, not a requirement — the fast clock is the counter-grown board (~76% of table closes are combat), and mulliganing toward the combo measured −9pp on the front edge when the sim's keep model tried it (plan-aware mulligan A/B, 2026-06-16). Keep the board/proliferate shape; treat combo pieces as gravy.

killTree.title: Radiation Sickness — The Wise Mothman
killTree.root:
The Wise Mothman resolved
rad counters tick every opponent's main phase
killTree.stall:
keep ticking rad + stacking counters —
the passive drain closes ~T10
killTree.caption: parallel vectors — they stack, not rank

background.need:
rad counters + proliferate
(Vorinclex / Tekuthal / Inexorable Tide)

lines.need:
Mindcrank + Bloodchief Ascension
(3 quest counters live)

Triumph of the Hordes
+ a wide creature board

axisGloss.FINDING: keep a key piece / tutor / 2+ selection cards
